title: Vaduvoor Bird Sanctuary
tagline: Vaduvoor Bird Sanctuary — wildlife reserve of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Vaduvoor Bird Sanctuary is a 128.10-hectare area located in Vaduvoor lake, Mannargudi Taluk, Thiruvarur District, Tamil Nadu, India.
overview.description: Vaduvoor Bird Sanctuary is a 128.10-hectare area located in Vaduvoor lake, Mannargudi Taluk, Thiruvarur District, Tamil Nadu, India. The sanctuary is about 25 kilometers from Thanjavur and 14 kilometers from Mannargudi on the Thanjavur-Kodiakkarai State Highway 63. It was created in 1999. The irrigation tank receives water from November to April every year which attracts numerous foreign birds from Europe and America.

topPlaces.name: Vaduvur
topPlaces.description: Vaduvur (also known as Vaduvoor) is a Tamil village situated between Thanjavur and Mannargudi in Tamil Nadu, India. Vaduvur is divided into three Punjayat for administrative purposes along the area known as Tannarasu.

topPlaces.name: Arundavapuram
topPlaces.description: Arundavapuram is a large village located in Ammapettai block, Papanasam Taluk, Thanjavur District, India.

topPlaces.name: Kambarnatham
topPlaces.description: Κambarnatham is a village in Ammapettai revenue block, Papanasam taluk, Thanjavur district of Tamil Nadu. It is one of the 46 panchayat villages in that revenue block.

topPlaces.name: Raghavambalpuram (Sadayarkoil)
topPlaces.description: Raghavambalpuram (Sadayarkoil) is a village in the Orathanadu taluk of Thanjavur district, Tamil Nadu, India. It is located approximately 15 km away from Thanjavur city, and is connected to the city via the Thanjavur-Mannarkudi highway.

topPlaces.name: Okkanadu Keelaiyur
topPlaces.description: Okkanadu Keelaiyur is a village panchayat located in the Thanjavur district of Tamil-Nadu state, India. Chennai is the state capital for Okkanadu Keelaiyur village.

topPlaces.name: Ammankudi
topPlaces.description: Ammankudi is a village in the Orathanadu taluk of Thanjavur district, Tamil Nadu, India. Ammankudi, also known as Rajarajeswaram and Devi Tapovanam is situated near Kumbakonam in Thanjavur District.

topPlaces.name: Vadapathy
topPlaces.description: Vadapathy is a village in the Papanasam taluk of Thanjavur district, Tamil Nadu, India.

topPlaces.name: Munnavalkottai
topPlaces.description: Munnavalkottai is a village in the Needamangalam taluk of Thiruvarur district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Vaduvoor Bird Sanctuary?
faq.a: The best time to visit Vaduvoor Bird Sanctuary is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Vaduvoor Bird Sanctuary?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Tiruchirappalli International Airport (67 km) and the nearest railway station is Tiruchirappalli Junction (70 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Vaduvoor Bird Sanctuary?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Vaduvoor Bird Sanctuary at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Vaduvoor Bird Sanctuary?
faq.a: Stays in Vaduvoor Bird Sanctuary start from ₹2,500 per night, with options across 5 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Vaduvoor Bird Sanctuary?
faq.a: The top attractions are Vaduvur, Arundavapuram, Kambarnatham, Raghavambalpuram (Sadayarkoil), Okkanadu Keelaiyur.
